a:r.a:t: A fragmented and manual target setting process limits agility, accuracy and visibility
Monthly Targets Rolled Out to Field
Insights Feed Next Target Setting Cycle
Performance data available with ~3+ week lag, limiting timely decision-making.
Heavy manual effort to extract, consolidate, and analyze data.
Decentralized target-setting approach leads to inconsistencies across sites and regions
Limited visibility into attainment distribution until late in the cycle
Increasing complexity from multiple channels, lead mix, and cross-brand dynamics

p:cNvPr.name: Speech Bubble: Rectangle with Corners Rounded 107
Speech Bubble: Rectangle with Corners Rounded 108
Speech Bubble: Rectangle with Corners Rounded 127
